projectDescription: A collection of practical behavioral contracts and protocols for making AI-assisted work more structured, inspectable, and repeatable across tasks like ideation, output shaping, GitHub publication, HTML tooling, agentic sessions, and review.
keyFeatures: 16 production-ready behavioral contracts covering the full AI-assisted workflow lifecycle
Situation-first protocol selection: pick by failure mode, not by name
Explicit operating modes, gate conditions, and stop conditions in every protocol
Evidence labeling (verified / inferred / hypothetical) enforced across analytical protocols
GitHub-specific protocols for README authoring, Pages publication, badge hygiene, and discovery infrastructure
Agentic session governance via posture contract and triad orchestration topology
PowerShell WinForms desktop app generation protocol with tiered safety constraints
Minimal stacking guidance: default to one protocol, stack only when justified
publicApiSurface: Output for Real Readers Protocol v2
HTML Page & Tool Briefing Protocol v2
GitHub Repository Publication Preparation Protocol v2
GitHub README Framing and Authoring Protocol v2
GitHub Pages Discovery Set Protocol v1
GitHub Badge, Telemetry & Counter Protocol v1.2.3
HTML and Website Discovery Set Protocol v1.2
PowerShell WinForms App Generator Protocol v1
